name: table-of-contents-insertion
description: Example declarative extension that combines heading metadata with Forge's generated table-of-contents transform.

permissions.reason: Reads active-note headings already parsed from local Markdown.
Writes a bounded table-of-contents template insertion into the current note when requested.

contributes.label: Table of contents metadata
contributes.description: Provides heading text, levels, line numbers, and table-of-contents metadata for the active note.

contributes.label: Insert generated table of contents
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported generated table-of-contents transform for the active note.
